query: Kde návrh oddeľuje audit od samotného vykonania dotazu?
failure_condition: expected decision absent from top-3, any out-of-scope result, or an ineligible status
rationale: Tests the canonical query-boundary decision without reproducing its full statement.

query: Čo má zostať autoritatívnym záznamom výsledku, keď sa mení vyhľadávacia vrstva?
failure_condition: no canonical-journal outcome in top-3 or any result outside ai-pos-app
rationale: Paraphrases the outcome that the memory journal remains canonical.

query: Na akom stroji je nasadený Compose pre timesheetové prostredie?
failure_condition: mini-core fact absent from top-3 or a result outside smart-timesheet
rationale: Slovak wording tests retrieval of the English mini-core fact.

query: Nájdi deterministický link z ABAP exportu na spoločný README súbor.
failure_condition: README artifact link absent from top-3, invalid artifact returned, or workspace leak
rationale: Tests normalized artifact-uri retrieval inside the ABAP exporter workspace.

query: Ako má architektúra chápať Graphiti po odstránení odvodeného indexu?
failure_condition: current decision absent from top-3 or superseded rec-045 returned as current truth
rationale: Targets the accepted current decision and explicitly excludes its superseded counterpart.

query: Čo ešte treba overiť pred tým, než sú release notes pripravené?
failure_condition: validation outcome absent from top-3 or non-ai-pos result returned
rationale: Uses a natural question for the release-note validation outcome.

query: Je izolácia wrkspacov povinná?
failure_condition: workspace-isolation fact absent from top-3 or workspace leak
rationale: The deliberate misspelling tests tolerant lexical/semantic retrieval without naming a record.

query: Ktorý evidovaný link v timesheete ukazuje na spoločnú projektovú dokumentáciu?
failure_condition: shared README link absent from top-3, invalid artifact returned, or workspace leak
rationale: Tests artifact-context retrieval without placing the exact URI in the query.

query: Aké pravidlo platí pre prácu so zdrojovou štruktúrou ABAP exportéra?
failure_condition: read-only decision absent from top-3 or candidate/rejected record returned
rationale: Paraphrases the accepted source-structure decision.

query: Aké staršie rozhodnutie o Graphiti patrí do histórie, nie medzi platné odporúčania?
failure_condition: superseded decision absent, returned without superseded status, or exposed by a current-mode query
rationale: Exercises the only dataset supersede case without inventing an as-of timestamp that the source fixture does not preserve.

query: Ktorá zásada stanovuje hranicu medzi auditom a retrievalom?
failure_condition: query-boundary fact absent from top-3 or wrong record type returned
rationale: Separates a fact-shaped formulation from Q01's decision-shaped test.

query: V aplikácii ai-pos nájdi uloženú väzbu na README spoločného repozitára.
failure_condition: artifact link absent from top-3, invalid artifact returned, or workspace leak
rationale: Tests exact artifact lookup in the application workspace.

query: Čo hovorí rozhodnutie Smart Timesheetu o spúšťaní Docker Compose?
failure_condition: Compose decision absent from top-3 or result outside smart-timesheet
rationale: Targets the decision version of the mini-core deployment statement.

query: Aký výsledok potvrdzuje, že ABAP export zachováva pôvodné usporiadanie zdrojov?
failure_condition: source-structure outcome absent from top-3 or wrong workspace result
rationale: Tests outcome retrieval rather than Q09's policy decision.

query: Čo v tomto návrhu znamená, že Graphiti je vymazateľný index?
failure_condition: erased-index fact absent from top-3 or superseded record presented as current
rationale: Tests the fact representation of the Graphiti conclusion.

query: Kde je vzťah k README označený ako deterministický a typu touches?
failure_condition: deterministic artifact relation absent from top-3 or invalid artifact returned
rationale: Uses the relation and origin claim, not the record identifier.

query: Prečo musí aplikácia pamäti oddeľovať jednotlivé pracovné priestory?
failure_condition: workspace-isolation decision absent from top-3 or any out-of-scope result
rationale: Tests the decision form of the isolation requirement.

query: Welches Speicherverfahren erlaubt Journal-Schreibvorgänge ohne blockierende Leser?
failure_condition: SQLite WAL outcome absent from top-3 or non-timesheet result returned
rationale: German query tests retrieval of the English SQLite WAL outcome.

query: Aké obmedzenie platí pre cesty k artefaktom ABAP exportéra?
failure_condition: artifact-path fact absent from top-3 or result outside abap-object-exporter
rationale: Targets the fact form of the artifact-path restriction.

query: Ktorý osobný záznam prepája evidovaný výsledok s README z projektu ai-pos?
failure_condition: personal README artifact link absent from top-3 or workspace leak
rationale: The record belongs to personal despite referencing an ai-pos artifact; scope follows record ownership.

query: Ktoré rozhodnutie v ai-pos zavádza query boundary a kde v ai-pos-app nájdem jeho README väzbu?
failure_condition: either required workspace contribution absent from top-3, any third-workspace result, or ineligible status
rationale: Deliberate two-workspace query: the decision is owned by ai-pos and the artifact link by ai-pos-app.

query: Aké rozhodnutie platí pre lokálny model v citlivom pracovnom priestore?
failure_condition: sensitive decision absent from top-3, sensitive_allowed ignored, or any result outside sap-work
rationale: Tests that sensitive content is retrievable only with explicit scope and policy permission.

query: Wo wird Docker Compose für die Zeiterfassung betrieben?
failure_condition: mini-core fact absent from top-3 or workspace leak
rationale: German wording supplies a second multilingual retrieval check.

query: Nájdi ABAP artifact link, ktorý ukazuje na README projektu ai-pos.
failure_condition: ABAP README artifact link absent from top-3, invalid artifact returned, or workspace leak
rationale: Exact URI-oriented lookup remains scoped to the ABAP exporter record owner.
